human_explanation: A person in a maroon shirt is swinging a steel bar while walking in a pedestrian area, creating a dangerous situation.
ai_explanation: A group of individuals is walking across a crosswalk, with one individual drawing attention for carrying a large object resembling a musical instrument or equipment case over his shoulder, which becomes more pronounced from snippet 9 to 20. This behavior is anomalous as it diverges from typical pedestrian activities in this area, highlighting unusual object transportation in a public space. scores.justification: The AI identifies an anomalous behavior related to carrying an unusual object but misinterprets the steel bar as a musical instrument or case. It vaguely captures the notion of unusual activity in a public space but lacks the specificity of the dangerous swinging action. The explanation is reasonably fluent but misses key details from the ground truth.
